summary: Rev 1 plan review (non-authoring). All decisive shipping/discoverability claims independently CONFIRMED (AGENTS.md not installed dmc-install.sh:373/:417; CONTEXT_MAP not shipped :51; linkcheck POINTER_DOCS excludes all touched files :59-63/:218-227; agents-md validate structural-only; AC6 tokens present; T019 free; all cited line refs real; schemas count 28). NEEDS_CLARIFICATION on three content-outline gaps that strike the constitution's core value: B1 Art.VI precedence ladder is internally inconsistent — it ranks the (prose) constitution above the machine SSoT while enshrining 'SSoT wins over prose' (ENFORCEMENT_MATRIX:9-11), and omits orchestration/*.json (the very SSoT EM names); B2 Art.V names only DMC_GATE_PROTECTED but the v0.2.6 runner exposes DMC_GATE_EXCLUDED + DMC_GATE_UPSTREAM (:16/:21/:36-37) — an override-enumeration article must cover the full DMC_GATE_* surface; B3 Art.II omits three load-bearing frozen surfaces (the 13 M9-built CI blocking checks CF14 says are NEVER weakened; orchestration/{harness-matrix,roles,models}.json; the settings.json 14 hook registrations). Advisories: A1 amendment-time VC4 re-run requirement (constitution outside doctor's scan surface); A2 AC3 grep should add .agents/skills to match the real dangling-ref scan (test-manifest-drift.sh:101-103); A3 cite-density AC (every normative clause names its source path); A4 security clean (docs-only, secret floor correctly un-weakenable). Minor: Art.II 'handoff rev 9 :9' cite imprecise for the 55-file KEEP.

criteria_checked.note: spot-verified real; one imprecise cite (handoff :9 vs KEEP)
B3 — CI blocking set + orchestration registries + settings.json registrations missing
B1 — prose-above-SSoT contradiction + registries missing from ladder

blockers.statement: Art. VI ladder ranks the prose constitution above the machine SSoT while codifying 'SSoT wins over prose' (EM:9-11) — internally inconsistent; orchestration/*.json omitted from the ladder.
blockers.suggested_fix: Scope constitutional supremacy to GOVERNANCE/PROCESS (amendment, precedence, frozen-surface enumeration, change procedure); enforcement/behavior FACTS defer to the machine SSoT (schemas + orchestration/*.json); add the registries to the ladder.

blockers.statement: Art. V names only DMC_GATE_PROTECTED; the v0.2.6 runner also exposes DMC_GATE_EXCLUDED and DMC_GATE_UPSTREAM (dmc-v0.2.6-gate-check-runner.sh:16/:21/:36-37).
blockers.suggested_fix: Enumerate the full DMC_GATE_* override surface; mark PROTECTED as the only knob carrying the G4 landmark-authorization guardrail; state the same authorization discipline applies to any override that flips a blocking verdict.

blockers.statement: Art. II omits: the 13 M9-built CI blocking checks + porcelain sandwiches (CF14 'NEVER weakened'), orchestration/{harness-matrix,roles,models}.json registries, and the .claude/settings.json hook-registration surface.
blockers.suggested_fix: Add all three to the Art. II enumeration with their amendability terms (CI checks never weakened per CF14; registries = machine SSoT amended only via the Art. III cycle; hook registrations = enforcement wiring, landmark-authorized scope required).

advisories.statement: One-time VC4 grep suffices at creation, but the constitution is amendable and outside the doctor scan surface — Art. VII should REQUIRE re-running the whole-word codex-lexeme check on every amendment (docs-only fix; preferable to expanding the doctor surface).
AC3 grep should add .agents/skills to mirror the real dangling-ref scan surface (test-manifest-drift.sh:101-103); m8-suite remains the CI-blocking backstop.
Add an AC asserting cite-density: every normative clause carries an inline source path (makes CITE-not-fork verifiable, not aspirational).
Security lens clean: docs-only, secret floor correctly carried as un-weakenable; scope genuinely minimal.
